title: When to Ask for Help
drDigitalIntro:
Some problems need a professional.
• Get help for strange sounds, a stuck screen, or a suspected virus.
• Also if you've tried the basics and nothing works.
• Tip: paste the error message into a search engine to find solutions.

playgroundTask.goal: You found help for a computer problem

steps.say: Search for help on this error message.

drDigitalSuccess: You searched for help! Copying an error message into a search engine is often the fastest way to find a solution.
drDigitalHint: Read the error, then type it into the search bar to find help.
